title: Can't Fight This Feeling
why_this_song: Can't Fight This Feeling by REO Speedwagon (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I can't fight this feeling any longer"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I can't fight this feeling any longer"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I can't fight this feeling any longer"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And I can't fight this feeling anymore"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "What started out as friendship has grown stronger"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I've forgotten what I started fighting for
It's time to bring this ship into the shore
And throw away the oars, forever
'Cause I can't fight this feeling anymore
Baby, I can't fight this feeling anymore
My life has been such a whirlwind since I saw you

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fight" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fight" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I can't fight this feeling any longer
And throw away the oars, forever
I've forgotten what I started fighting for

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: What started out as friendship has grown stronger
'Cause I can't fight this feeling anymore
And I can't fight this feeling anymore

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Can't Fight This Feeling", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Can't Fight This Feeling", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Can't Fight This Feeling" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Can't Fight This Feeling" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Can't Fight This Feeling" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Can't Fight This Feeling", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
